title: PowerPoint Export
excerpt: Need a way to export boards, dashboard and various charts to PowerPoint.

posts.author: KVH (Karen Vinz-Holcomb)
posts.cookedHtml: Need a way to export boards, dashboard and various charts to PowerPoint.

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re looking to export data from boards into PowerPoint tables and charts, you might want to check out an app called Board to Presentation. It’s designed specifically for this use case—letting you turn your monday.com data into PowerPoint presentation with tables, charts and graphs.

More info here: Export boards to presentations! (tables, charts, graphs)

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Stephen,

yes. Board to Presentation is now available on monday marketplace.

Link to app:

monday.com

Board to Presentation - monday.com Marketplace

Transform board data into PPT presentation tables and charts

posts.author: geoffbarrenger (Geoff Barrenger)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @TinyFoxLabs - Don’t know how to send a direct message so thought to ask here. Do you have plans to offer flexibility in the powerpoint template? (ie: My company prefers a stylized template of the powerpoint). In addition - how can we customize using Portfolios to do a template with one Project Per Page, and certain details about each project on each page? Would be very helpful to give a 10-15 page PDF in a Brand Stylized PDF, overviewing the 10 projects in flight, and some details of each project on each page (last step, current step, next step, project health, project timeline, list of stakeholders, etc). Feel free to email me or respond here geoff.barrenger@ralphlauren.com

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @geoffbarrenger, currently, we don’t support stylized PowerPoint templates. However, we are planning to support them in the future. Right now, we are implementing data filtering based on column values (similar to advanced filtering in monday boards). Once this feature is completed, our next plan is to add support for stylized PowerPoint templates.

posts.author: geoffbarrenger (Geoff Barrenger)
posts.cookedHtml: HELLO! @TinyFoxLabs - Just saw the customize template is available. This is great! Going to give it a shot. Is there a way to export a presentation with ONE PROJECT per SLIDE? ie: If I have 10 projects in the filter, I would like a 10 page powerpoint, with select fields displayed within the slide. I would also like to templatize where those fields are displayed in the slide. This would be fantastic. Very excited - please feel free to reach out with any quesitons.

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @geoffbarrenger . Yes, the functionality is still in beta, so not everything is copied yet. We are working to ensure the full design from your template is replicated. If something is missing, please use the feedback popup that appears when you create a presentation. Select “dislike” and let us know what was not copied.

Regarding your question about “ONE PROJECT,” could you clarify whether you mean a group, a board item, or a board?

It may be easier to discuss the details over email. We will reach out to the address you provided earlier.

posts.author: Atul (Atul | cloudvandana apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can use our app BuildMyDocs which enables you to generate PPTX/PDF from Item Data onto a PPTX template.

You can copy Columns, Images, and subitems table onto the PPT.

The data copied over will follow the font style, design, and positioning of the original PPTX.

Here’s the example template you may use → PPTX Template

Make sure to replace the “Merge Values“ with the exact values for each column, subitem table from the settings section of our app, which is unique to each board.

If you need a demo, feel free to reach out → apps[at]cloudvandana.com
